title: D&D 2024 Adventuring Gear
description: Schema for data/equipment/adventuring_gear.json. Top-level keys are item names; values describe cost, weight, category, and (for packs) the list of items they contain.

weight.description: Item weight in pounds, or the literal sentinel 'Variable' for catch-all entries like 'Musical Instrument' where the underlying SKU's weight depends on the specific instrument. TODO(data-completeness): consider expanding such catch-alls into one entry per instrument so weight can always be numeric.

contents.description: For Pack items, the bundled item names.
